zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Percy於1332年出生在英國諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓時，她的父親William de Percy30歲，母親Margaret22歲。她於1353年與Thomas de Heaton在英國諾圖波藍德希頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年在英國諾圖波藍德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Percy于1332年出生在英国諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓时，她的父亲William de Percy30岁，母亲Margaret22岁。她于1353年与Thomas de Heaton在英国諾圖波藍德希頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1383年在英国諾圖波藍德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Percy was born in 1332, in Preston, Northumberland, England, her father, William de Percy, was 30 and her mother, Margaret, was 22. She married Thomas de Heaton in 1353, in Heaton, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1383, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Percy est née en 1332, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William de Percy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Heaton en 1353, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1383, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Percy 1332 in Preston, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Percy 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret 22. Sie hat 1353 in Heaton, Northumberland, England Thomas de Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1383 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Percy è nata il nel 1332 nel Preston, Northumberland, England, sua padre, William de Percy, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Heaton nel 1353, nel Heaton, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1383, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Percyが1332年にイギリスノースウンバーランドプレストンで生まれた時，父William de Percyは30歳，母Margaretは22歳であった。1353年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンでThomas de Heatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Percy(이)가 1332년 영국 노르스벌랜드 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Percy(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 Thomas de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Percy nasceu em 1332, em Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Percy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Heaton em 1353, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1383, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Percy родилась в 1332 г. в местности престон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Percy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Heaton в 1353 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1383 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Percy nació en 1332, en Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Percy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas de Heaton en 1353, en Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1383, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
